# `prices/state_cpi_general_inflation_pct`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: State-wise CPI inflation (General) — annual average  
**One-line**: State-wise headline CPI inflation (General sub-index), year-on-year %, annual average per fiscal year.  
**Source artifact last modified**: 2026-05-16 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/prices/state_cpi_general_inflation_pct.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/prices/state_cpi_general_inflation_pct.json)

## Definition

State-wise headline CPI inflation (General sub-index), year-on-year %, annual average per fiscal year. Sub-national sibling of the national `prices/national_cpi_combined_index_annual`. Tamil Nadu inflation can diverge meaningfully from Bihar inflation in any given year because of local food, fuel, and housing dynamics — citizens experience their own state's number, not the national average.

- **Temporal**: 2014-04..2024-04 (11 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs); 34 entities (34 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 374

## Methodology vintage

RBI Handbook 2024-25 edition

## Notes

Source: RBI Handbook of Statistics on Indian States 2024-25 edition, Table 108. RBI publishes already as YoY % inflation (not index level), so no further computation needed.
